name: coordinated-debunk-engine
description: Deep investigative fact-checking and debunking of high-priority malicious claims using multi-source verification.

steps.name: deconstruct-claim
steps.prompt: Decompose the high-priority claim: {{input}} into 5-10 specific sub-questions that can be empirically verified.

steps.name: deep-evidence-gathering
steps.prompt: Perform an exhaustive search for each sub-question in {{sub_questions}}. Cross-reference at least 15 independent authoritative sources. Prioritize primary sources, academic research, and verified official records.

steps.name: craap-verification
steps.prompt: Evaluate the gathered evidence: {{gathered_evidence}} using the CRAAP methodology (Currency, Relevance, Authority, Accuracy, Purpose). Identify contradictions or false premises in the original claim.

steps.name: generate-debunking-report
steps.prompt: Synthesize the verified facts: {{verified_facts}} into a comprehensive debunking report. Include a 'Lies Detected' section, a point-by-point rebuttal, and a full bibliography of cited sources in APA format.
